Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
223 
PAHP_MOS 
LABEL: 
Prepaid Ambulatory Health Plan (PAHP) Months 
DESCRIPTION: Number of months the beneficiary was enrolled in a Medical-only Prepaid Ambulatory Health Plan 
(PAHP) Managed Care Plan in the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: PAHP_MOS 
LONG NAME: PAHP_MOS 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
3 
FILE(S): 
Managed Care 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility
